title: Tuition Payment Warning
scenario: You receive an email saying your tuition payment failed and your enrollment will be cancelled unless you pay immediately through a link in the message.

answers.A: Click the link and pay immediately.
answers.B: Reply to the email asking for payment details.
answers.C: Log in through the official student portal to check my account.
answers.D: Contact the university finance office using the official website contact details.

explanation: Tuition scams use fear of losing enrollment to push students into fake payment links. Always verify through the official student portal or finance office.
proTip: Do not pay from email links when the message threatens urgent account consequences.
